evals.name: aoa-bounded-change-quality
evals.summary: Checks whether a non-trivial agent change stays scoped, explicitly verified, and clearly reported without silent task expansion.
evals.bounded_claim_short: This eval checks scoped change discipline on bounded tasks rather than broad coding ability.
evals.use_when_short: Use when workflow quality on a bounded change is part of the claim under review.
evals.do_not_use_short: Do not use it to generalize capability beyond the bounded task family.
evals.blind_spot_short: It cannot prove correctness outside the visible bounded workflow surface.
evals.what_this_does_not_prove: A passing result does not prove general engineering quality or broad autonomy.

evals.name: aoa-context-scan-quality
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent performs a small context scan before acting and keeps the scan proportional to the requested task.
evals.bounded_claim_short: This eval checks whether context gathering stays minimal and task-proportional before action.
evals.use_when_short: Use when bounded orientation discipline is part of the workflow claim.
evals.do_not_use_short: Do not use it to judge broad repository understanding or long-horizon planning.
evals.blind_spot_short: It cannot prove that the chosen scan was globally optimal beyond the bounded task surface.
evals.what_this_does_not_prove: A passing result does not prove deep architectural understanding of the whole repo.
